evidence.claim: Evidence for Problem Statement and Objective Definition / problem_clear_precise.
evidence.quote: The central problem of this work is therefore practical: the research project must turn local agent-evaluation ideas into reproducible engineering evidence without inventing measurements.

evidence.claim: Evidence for Problem Statement and Objective Definition / scientific_context_present.
evidence.quote: This thesis evaluates whether a private AI-only research infrastructure can be upgraded from a framework specification into an empirically executed engineering artifact.

evidence.claim: Evidence for Problem Statement and Objective Definition / scientific_context_present.
evidence.quote: The central problem of this work is therefore practical: the research project must turn local agent-evaluation ideas into reproducible engineering evidence without inventing measurements.

evidence.claim: Evidence for Problem Statement and Objective Definition / objective_explicit.
evidence.quote: This thesis evaluates whether a private AI-only research infrastructure can be upgraded from a framework specification into an empirically executed engineering artifact.

evidence.claim: Evidence for Methodology and Solution Approach / ideal_solution_before_constraints.
evidence.quote: The ideal solution would evaluate managed coding agents on a curated benchmark corpus with explicit ground-truth tasks, independent reviewers, multiple agent vendors, repeated runs, preserved prompts, and statistically justified comparisons.

evidence.claim: Evidence for Methodology and Solution Approach / requirements_engineering_present.
evidence.quote: First, each corpus target is described in JSON with path, kind, expected build and test behavior, coverage requirement, telemetry requirement, and ground-truth status.

evidence.claim: Evidence for Methodology and Solution Approach / method_selection_justified.
evidence.quote: qyl and Arqio were selected because they match the research question. qyl contains the automation, OpenTelemetry, dashboard, collector, and semantic-convention surfaces needed to evaluate instrumentation-aware research infrastructure.

evidence.claim: Evidence for Methodology and Solution Approach / alternatives_discussed.
evidence.quote: Alternatives were considered implicitly by the available local workspace: a standalone thesis-only script would be simpler, but it would not exercise the same automation and observability surfaces; a cloud benchmark would be broader, but it would introduce credentials and non-local reproducibility risk.

evidence.claim: Evidence for Results and Discussion / artifact_evaluated_against_goals.
evidence.quote: Empirical Infrastructure for Managed AI Coding-Agent Evaluation

evidence.claim: Evidence for Results and Discussion / artifact_evaluated_against_goals.
evidence.quote: This thesis evaluates whether a private AI-only research infrastructure can be upgraded from a framework specification into an empirically executed engineering artifact.

evidence.claim: Evidence for Results and Discussion / empirical_results_reported.
evidence.quote: It does not claim managed-agent accuracy, vendor comparison, or statistical significance unless those runs are actually executed.

evidence.claim: Evidence for Results and Discussion / empirical_results_reported.
evidence.quote: The contribution is therefore a measured dynamic-harness baseline for bachelor-thesis evidence production rather than a fabricated agent benchmark.

evidence.claim: Evidence for Style and Expression / technical_language_precise.
evidence.quote: Arqio contains architecture-analysis assets, benchmark fixtures, metrics files, and dependency-analysis code.

evidence.claim: Evidence for Style and Expression / neutral_academic_tone.
evidence.quote: The work implements a local qyl and Arqio evaluation harness, integrates build, test, coverage, semantic-convention, and style-gate evidence, and records raw outputs as reproducible thesis artifacts.

evidence.claim: Evidence for Style and Expression / neutral_academic_tone.
evidence.quote: The current execution uses local repositories as the corpus and reports measured build, test, coverage, and classification-agreement evidence where available.

evidence.claim: Evidence for Citation Rules and References / current_sources_indicated.
evidence.quote: The latest executed run used run identifier 20260519-173709-local.

evidence.claim: Evidence for Citation Rules and References / source_quality_mixed.
evidence.quote: Ground-truth labels are unset for the initial corpus, so the empirical claim is limited to harness feasibility, result reproducibility, coverage availability, telemetry availability, and label agreement for deterministic architecture classification.

evidence.claim: Evidence for Citation Rules and References / source_quality_mixed.
evidence.quote: The thesis cites official documentation for OpenTelemetry, OPA/Rego, Vale, .NET testing, Coverlet, and GitHub Actions where those tools define the reproducible environment [citation:opentelemetry-dotnet,opentelemetry-semconv,opentelemetry-otlp,opa-rego,vale,dotnet-test,coverlet,github-actions-setup-dotnet] . qyl and Arqio are cited as local software artifact
